changes: SITE_CONFIGS map: built-in nav, homeUrl, tokenBar, tokenBarBase per site (Send, Tools)
active-nav attribute: explicitly mark one nav link active by matching href
Auto active-nav from window.location.pathname when using built-in profile
tokenBar reflected to attribute from profile in onReady if not explicitly set
home-url and token-bar-base fall back to profile values
Backward compatible: all v1.0.4 explicit attributes still work as overrides

attributes.site: Product name after SG/ — used to select built-in profile (Send | Tools)
attributes.home-url: Logo href override (default: from profile or /)
attributes.nav-items: JSON array override [{label, href, active?, external?}]
attributes.token-bar: Boolean — activates built-in token bar (auto-set from profile if not provided)
attributes.token-bar-base: Base URL override for token navigation
attributes.active-nav: Href string — marks matching nav item active (auto-detected from pathname if omitted)

slots.locale: Locale picker (light DOM — SgI18n finds it by document.getElementById)
slots.cta: Custom CTA widget (escape hatch when not using built-in token bar)
